news.headline: Nasa chief defends choice of all-male Artemis III crew
news.summary:
Nasa’s administrator Jared Isaacman on Wednesday defended the make-up of the space agency’s latest Artemis crew, an all-male group.
The nominations have earned criticism that Nasa may have acted in accordance with US President Donald Trump’s direction to eliminate diversity and inclusion efforts.

news.headline: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
news.summary: India's government said three Indian sailors were missing and 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.
